title: Re-Crafted
description: A modpack completely refreshing the game, adding new biomes, structures, items, blocks and mobs.
body:
## WARNING: Re-Crafted is discontinued. It's continuation, [Re-Crafted 2, is available here.](https://modrinth.com/modpack/re-crafted-2)



## ![Re-Crafted Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f462a6a6bfb2109a332cbbf9d3fe39e1794570.png)

A complete refresh of the vanilla experience modpack adding more than 170+ mods, new biomes, mobs, items, blocks, features, achievements, you name it! If you want to keep your game feeling vanilla-like while enjoying the most of modded Minecraft this modpack is for you!
## Features

💻 **Custom in-game UI** - Making your experience nicer!

🌵 **New Biomes** - The exploring is even more exciting!

🏛 **New Structures** - There's always a place to visit!

📈 **Skilltree** - Your character gets stronger the longer you play!

🌱 **Better Farming** - New crops and ways of growing makes farming actually fun!

🧹 **Archeology** - Ever wondered what your world is hiding? Find out yourself!

🔎 **Minimap and Worldmap** - Never get lost in your world, mark your points of interest!

👀 **Shaders** - Your game looks stunning everywhere you go!

🔧 **QOL Features** - Things you didn't know you needed are here!

✅ **Optimalization mods** - Your game is running smoothly no matter the amount of mods!

**_And much more!_**
